summary:
Iteration 5 frontend testing of NEW configurability layer: Alur Bisnis page, Master Proses workflow builder, 7 new Master Data tabs, and Dashboard KPI tooltip + drilldown dialog. All 11 review items pass with ZERO JS console errors.

1) Sidebar — both new entries 'Alur Bisnis' (sidebar-nav-business-flow) and 'Master Proses' (sidebar-nav-master-process) render and navigate correctly via Workflow + GitBranch icons.

2) /business-flow — business-flow-header renders. All 6 flow nodes flow-node-F1..F6 visible (Order Penjualan → Order Produksi → Proses Produksi → Quality Control → Produk Jadi → Pengiriman). Each card shows Input/Output panel. Hero strip + Master Data sources panel render.

3) /master-process — master-process-header + workflow-visual + all 10 process-card-P01..P10 render. Summary strip shows Total Tahap=10, Aktif=9, Durasi=700 menit, ≈11.7 jam. P07 (Repair / Touch-up) correctly shown nonaktif and excluded from visual workflow strip. 
   • REORDER: click process-move-down-P01 → list re-ordered (P02 first, P01 second) and Tahap numbers re-sequenced. process-move-up-P01 restores order. 
   • TOGGLE: clicking switch on process-card-P03 reduces visual workflow stage count (visual 'Tahap' text-occurrence count dropped 32→29 = exactly 3 fewer per removed card, confirming one card removed); toggling back restores. 
   • ADD: add-process-btn opens process-form-dialog. Filled name='Tahap Uji Tambah', desc, icon=Hammer, color=#107E3E, durasi=25. process-form-save creates process-card-P11 (auto-numbered) and toast 'Tahap baru ditambahkan' shown. 
   • EDIT: process-edit-P11 opens process-form-dialog populated with existing values. 
   • DELETE: process-delete-P11 removes card; list count 11→10 and toast 'Tahap dihapus' shown.

4) /master-data — All 7 new tabs render data tables with rows: Tipe Produk (types-table, 10 rows), Spesifikasi (specs-table, 8 rows), Kategori Material (material-cat-table, 7 rows), Parameter QC (qc-params-table, 8 rows), Kategori Defect (defects-table, 7 rows), Status Produksi (prod-status-table, 7 rows), Status Pengiriman (del-status-table, 6 rows). Existing tabs (Produk, Kategori Produk, etc.) still render.

5) /dashboard — All 12 KPI cards (kpi-target, kpi-realisasi, kpi-achievement, kpi-curing, kpi-qc, kpi-reject, kpi-stok, kpi-material, kpi-mold, kpi-wip, kpi-efisiensi, kpi-jadi-hari) render with corresponding {kpi}-info icon buttons. Hovering kpi-curing-info shows a Radix tooltip ([role=tooltip] count=1). Clicking kpi-curing-info does NOT open the drilldown dialog (stopPropagation working). Clicking the KPI card body (kpi-curing / kpi-target / kpi-reject) opens kpi-drilldown-dialog showing colored gradient header, Formula section, Sumber Data section, 7-day AreaChart 'Tren 7 Hari Terakhir', and 5-item Breakdown bars (kpi-breakdown-0..4).

6) Regressions — /planning planning-tab-gantt + planning-tab-floor + plant-floor still functional. /production-execution global-process-status renders 5 pipeline stages. line-card-0 inside Eksekusi Produksi no longer contains the big line illustration SVG (svg count inside card = 0), confirming the regression cleanup. No console errors at any point during the run.
critical_code_review_comments: MasterData.js is now 659 lines — getting close to the 700-line guideline ceiling. With seven new sections it would benefit from extracting the per-tab Section configurations (column defs + form fields) into a sibling file like masterDataSections.js, leaving MasterData.js as a thin tabs router.

mockData.js is 614 lines and now hosts 9 new data exports (productTypes, productSpecifications, materialCategories, qcParameters, defectCategories, productionStatuses, deliveryStatuses, processDefinitions, businessFlow, kpiDefinitions). Recommend splitting into /data/products.js, /data/process.js, /data/kpi.js, /data/businessFlow.js, /data/masterData.js to ease future maintenance.

MasterProcess.js ProcessForm: when opening the Tambah dialog after Editing once, the form state could leak from a previous edit because the reset is performed inside onOpenChange instead of in a useEffect on `initial`. Manual test shows it currently resets correctly, but the pattern is fragile — prefer useEffect(() => setForm(initial || defaults), [initial, open]).

Workflow visual count uses processes.filter(p => p.aktif) and the Tahap label uses p.urutan from the parent list (numbered across all stages including inactive ones). When P07 is inactive, the active strip displays Tahap 6 jumping straight to Tahap 8. This may surprise users — consider either renumbering only the active visual strip or appending a small '(skipped Tahap 7)' marker.

KPICard.js: 'Klik untuk detail' helper text uses opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 but the wrapper has no `group` class, so the hint never appears. Add className='group' on the wrapper to enable it, or remove the dead markup.

KPIDrilldownDialog accent prop accepts a hex string but Dashboard.js passes accent variant keys ('warning', 'neutral', 'success', 'default', 'error') instead of hex. The dialog therefore renders the gradient using literal 'warning' / 'success' strings which the browser silently treats as invalid colors (falls back to transparent). The header still has a background due to opacity, but the trend chart Area stroke and breakdown bars will not show the intended colour. Quick fix: map variant→hex in Dashboard.js before passing to KPIDrilldownDialog (e.g., {default:'#0A6ED1', success:'#107E3E', warning:'#E9730C', error:'#B00020', neutral:'#59687A'}).
Carry-over from earlier iterations: FormDialog still performs no field-level validation despite `required: true`. NotificationsPopover footer anchors remain inert.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-5 features verified: sidebar-nav-business-flow & sidebar-nav-master-process navigate; /business-flow renders flow-node-F1..F6 with Input/Output; /master-process workflow-visual + process-card-P01..P10 + reorder (process-move-up-/down-*) + toggle (Switch on each card) + add (add-process-btn → process-form-dialog → process-form-{name,desc,icon-*,color-*,duration,active,save}) + edit (process-edit-*) + delete (process-delete-*) all work. Master Data 7 new tabs (types-table/specs-table/material-cat-table/qc-params-table/defects-table/prod-status-table/del-status-table) render with rows. Dashboard 12 KPI cards each have an info icon ({kpi}-info) showing tooltip on hover and stopPropagation working — clicking the card opens kpi-drilldown-dialog with Formula + Sumber Data + 7-day trend + Breakdown bars. /planning Plant Floor + /production-execution global-process-status regressions pass. Single code-quality note for next agent: KPIDrilldownDialog accent prop is being passed variant strings ('warning' etc.) instead of hex from Dashboard.js — gradient/stroke colors don't render with intended hex; dialog still opens correctly so functional test passes but visually the chart accent is off. See critical_code_review_comments item #6.
rca of the issue: No functional bugs found. One visual quality note: KPIDrilldownDialog expects a hex `accent` prop but Dashboard.js passes variant keys (default/success/warning/error/neutral) — chart stroke/breakdown bar colors silently fall back. Header gradient still appears because of how the linear-gradient inline-style is composed with the literal string + 'cc' suffix which renders an effective accent only by coincidence on dark background. Suggested fix mapped in code-review comment #6.
